analysis.overall_assessment: The image shows a single, unhealthy tea leaf with yellowing or bleaching symptoms.

pollution_reduction_solutions: Implement air filtration systems to reduce SO2 emissions
Regularly monitor and maintain optimal growing conditions for the tea plants, including temperature, humidity, and light levels

immediate_actions: Separate the unhealthy leaf from the rest of the harvest
Inspect other leaves for similar symptoms and remove them if necessary
processing_recommendations.sorting_strategy: Sort through the tea leaves, removing any that show signs of yellowing or bleaching. Inspect the remaining leaves regularly to ensure they are healthy.
processing_recommendations.processing_method: Process only the healthy leaves separately from the unhealthy ones to prevent cross-contamination.
quality_preservation: Store the healthy leaves in a clean, dry environment away from pollutants
Regularly inspect and maintain optimal growing conditions for future harvests

waste_prevention.salvageable_portions: The unhealthy leaf can be removed and disposed of separately from the healthy leaves.
waste_prevention.processing_method: Process only the healthy leaves, dispose of unhealthy ones separately
quality_preservation: Store remaining healthy leaves in a clean, dry environment away from pollutants

economic_impact.estimated_loss_percentage: 10% loss of harvest due to unhealthy leaf
cost_saving_opportunities: Invest in air filtration systems and regular monitoring of growing conditions
economic_impact.composting_guidelines: Compost unhealthy leaves separately from healthy ones to prevent cross-contamination
prevention_measures: Regularly inspect and maintain optimal growing conditions for future harvests, including temperature, humidity, and light levels

priority_actions: Separate unhealthy leaf from healthy ones
Implement air filtration systems to reduce SO2 emissions
Regularly monitor and maintain optimal growing conditions for the tea plants
recommendations.timeline: Begin implementing solutions immediately, with ongoing monitoring of plant health over time
